title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 434.060 - Parents may recover minor's gaming losses
text:
434.060.  Parents may recover minor's gaming losses. — If any minor shall lose any money or property at any game, gambling device, or by any bet or wager whatever, the parent or conservator of such minor may sue for and recover from the winner such money or property, or the value thereof, so lost by such minor.
(RSMo 1939 § 3396, A.L. 1953 p. 321, A.L. 1983 S.B. 44 & 45) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 3009; 1919 § 5746; 1909 § 6627
